properties.name: Texas Gulf Coal Province / Texas Region
properties.description: Representative marker for the Gulf Coal Province / Texas Region coal and lignite areas documented by RRC historical coal mining maps.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Historical Coal Mining Regions/Fields and Sites in Texas
properties.notes: Representative regional centroid; not a mine or boundary polygon.

properties.name: Interior Coal Province - North Texas Region
properties.description: Representative marker for the Interior Coal Province coal-bearing areas in North Texas, including historic bituminous coal districts.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Historical Coal Mining Regions/Fields and Sites in Texas
properties.notes: Representative regional centroid; not a mine or boundary polygon.

properties.name: East Texas Wilcox Group Lignite Belt
properties.description: Broad marker for East Texas near-surface lignite occurrences associated with Wilcox Group lignites.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - Texas Lignite: Near-Surface and Deep-Basin Resources
properties.notes: Representative belt marker based on generalized geologic distribution, not an exact deposit outline.

properties.name: Central Texas Wilcox Group Lignite Belt
properties.description: Broad marker for the central Texas lignite belt that includes many mine-mouth lignite operations and reclamation areas.
properties.sourceName: Bureau of Economic Geology - Texas Lignite: Near-Surface and Deep-Basin Resources
properties.notes: Representative belt marker; coordinates selected near Robertson/Limestone/Milam lignite concentration.

properties.name: South Texas Jackson Group / Olmos Coal Belt
properties.description: Representative marker for South Texas coal and lignite-bearing formations, including Jackson Group and Olmos/San Pedro coal context.
properties.sourceName: USGS - The San Pedro and Santo Tomas Coal Beds
properties.notes: Representative regional point; not an exact bed or mine boundary.

properties.name: Sabine Uplift / Northeast Texas Lignite Area
properties.description: Representative marker for the Sabine/Northeast Texas lignite mining area around Hallsville, Marshall, and adjacent counties.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Lignite Surface Mine Permit Locations, February 2023
properties.notes: Representative regional marker near major surface mine areas.

properties.name: Eagle Pass / Maverick County Coal Field
properties.description: Representative marker for the Eagle Pass coal field and Olmos Formation surface-mining context near Eagle Pass.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Eagle Pass Coal Mine
properties.notes: Representative coal-field marker, separate from the exact mine marker.

properties.name: San Miguel Lignite Mine
properties.operator: NACG Texas / San Miguel Electric Cooperative
properties.description: Surface lignite mine near Christine that supplies the adjacent San Miguel power plant.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - San Miguel Lignite Mine
properties.notes: Public source reports GPS coordinates; use as facility/mine-area centroid, not property boundary.

properties.name: Kosse Coal Mine
properties.description: Surface lignite mine supplying Oak Grove Steam Electric Station.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Kosse Coal Mine
properties.notes: Public source reports exact WGS84 project coordinates; mine spans a large permit area.

properties.name: Jewett Coal Mine
properties.operator: Texas Westmoreland Coal Co. / NRG area
properties.description: Large lignite mine area historically associated with Limestone Generating Station and Jewett mining operations.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Observatory - Jewett Coal Mine
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEO; used as mine-area centroid.

properties.name: Jewett E/F Mine Area
properties.description: Jewett E/F mine project area north of Jewett, documented in USACE public notice with a mine-center coordinate.
properties.sourceName: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers - Jewett E/F Mine public notice
properties.notes: Coordinate converted from 31°29′20″N, 96°7′10″W; project area spans thousands of acres.

properties.name: South Hallsville No. 1 / Sabine Mine
properties.operator: Sabine Mining Company / North American Coal
properties.description: Large Northeast Texas lignite surface mine near Hallsville/Marshall.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Sabine Mine
properties.notes: Public source reports GPS coordinates; mine spans broader permit areas.

properties.name: Three Oaks Mine
properties.description: Lignite surface mine built to serve the Rockdale/Alcoa/Sandow power system; now treated as a closed/reclaimed mining area.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Observatory - Three Oaks Coal Mine
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEO; status generalized from public history and RRC permit-map context.

properties.name: Eagle Pass Mine
properties.operator: Dos Republicas / Camino Real Fuels legacy
properties.description: Surface coal mine northeast of Eagle Pass; RRC reported mining had ceased and the site was working toward full reclamation.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Eagle Pass Coal Mine
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEM; status context from RRC reclamation announcement.

properties.name: Oak Hill Mine
properties.description: Rusk County lignite surface mine included in RRC coal mining records and public mine data.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Oak Hill Strip Mine
properties.notes: Public source reports rounded coordinates; use as mine-area centroid.

properties.name: Darco Mine Area
properties.description: Harrison County lignite mine area associated with activated-carbon/industrial lignite operations listed in RRC mine records.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate point near Darco/South Hallsville area; use for educational map only.

properties.name: Calvert Mine Area
properties.description: Robertson County lignite mining area listed in RRC/Texas Almanac coal mine inventories.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate mine-area point near Calvert; public map/list source does not provide precise coordinates.

properties.name: Bremond Mine Area
properties.description: Bremond lignite mine area included in RRC coal mining online records and statewide permit inventories.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Texas Coal Mining Online Records
properties.notes: Approximate mine-area point near Bremond; suitable for atlas overview, not property boundary.

properties.name: Big Brown Mine Area
properties.description: Former lignite surface mine associated with Big Brown power plant and Freestone County lignite production.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Big Brown Mine
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEM; large surface mine area represented by single marker.

properties.name: Gibbons Creek Mine Area
properties.description: Gibbons Creek lignite mine area in Grimes County, now a reclamation/legacy coal-mining site.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate marker near Gibbons Creek mine/power site; public map/list source does not provide exact coordinate.

properties.name: Sandow Mine / Rockdale Lignite Area
properties.description: Historic Rockdale/Sandow lignite mine area that supplied the Alcoa/Sandow industrial power system.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Representative point southwest of Rockdale; not a property boundary.

properties.name: Monticello-Winfield Mine Area
properties.description: Northeast Texas lignite mine area listed in statewide coal mining location maps.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate point near Winfield/Monticello lignite area.

properties.name: Monticello Thermo Mine Area
properties.description: Monticello Thermo lignite mine area listed in RRC/Texas Almanac permit-location inventories.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate regional marker; use for historical/reclamation context.

properties.name: Leesburg Mine Area
properties.description: Leesburg lignite mine area included in RRC/Texas Almanac permitted coal mining operations maps.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate point near Leesburg; source map provides named location but not precise coordinates.

properties.name: Turlington Mine Area
properties.description: Turlington lignite mine area near Big Brown/Fairfield lignite development, listed in RRC online records.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Texas Coal Mining Online Records
properties.notes: Approximate marker near Fairfield/Turlington lignite area.

properties.name: Palafox Mine Area
properties.description: Webb County Palafox Mine area in the San Pedro/Santo Tomas coal context; RRC order describes Palafox as a Webb County mine northwest of Laredo.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Palafox Mine reclamation release order
properties.notes: Approximate point northwest of Laredo; source does not provide public GPS coordinate in search extract.

properties.name: Trevino Mine Area
properties.description: Trevino Mine application areas listed in RRC online records; USGS discusses San Pedro zone coal beds developed at Palafox and Trevino mine areas.
properties.sourceName: USGS - The San Pedro and Santo Tomas Coal Beds
properties.notes: Approximate Webb County marker; use as permit/appraisal context rather than an exact mine entrance.

properties.name: San Miguel Power Plant
properties.description: Lignite-fired power plant adjacent to San Miguel Mine near Christine; planned transition context may be added separately if desired.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Observatory - San Miguel Coal Plant TX USA
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEO; separate from San Miguel Mine marker.

properties.name: Oak Grove Steam Electric Station
properties.description: Lignite-fired power station near Franklin supplied by the nearby Kosse Mine.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Oak Grove Plant
properties.notes: Exact plant coordinates from GEM/GridInfo.

properties.name: Limestone Generating Station
properties.description: Large coal-fired generating station in the Jewett/Farrar area historically tied to nearby lignite mining and coal supply systems.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Observatory - Limestone Coal Plant TX USA
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEO; plant uses a combination of coal fuels over time.

properties.name: Martin Lake Steam Electric Station
properties.description: Large coal-fired power station southwest of Tatum with historical relationship to East Texas lignite mining and coal rail supply.
properties.sourceName: GridInfo - Martin Lake coal plant
properties.notes: Coordinates from GridInfo; facility marker, not a mine.

properties.name: Fayette Power Project
properties.operator: Lower Colorado River Authority / Austin Energy
properties.description: Coal-fired power plant near La Grange; important statewide coal consumption facility, though not a lignite mine.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Observatory - Fayette Power Project Coal Plant TX USA
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEO; included as coal-use/processing-generation infrastructure.

properties.name: Coleto Creek Power Station
properties.description: Coal-fired power station near Fannin and Coleto Creek Reservoir; included as coal-use infrastructure and transition/redevelopment site.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Coleto Creek power station
properties.notes: Exact coordinates from GEM; plant status should be checked if used for current operations.

properties.name: Big Brown Steam Electric Station
properties.description: Retired coal-fired power plant associated with Big Brown lignite mining and Fairfield Lake.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Observatory - Big Brown Strip Coal Mine
properties.notes: Coordinates from GEO plant/mine vicinity; use alongside Big Brown Mine record for extraction-generation relationship.

properties.name: Sandow Power / Alcoa Industrial Fuel Complex
properties.description: Rockdale-area industrial power complex historically fueled by local lignite mines and tied to aluminum smelting operations.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate complex marker in Rockdale/Sandow area; detailed plant coordinates should be verified if used for navigation.

properties.name: Gibbons Creek Steam Station / Coal Handling Site
properties.description: Former lignite-coal power and handling site associated with Gibbons Creek mine and reservoir.
properties.sourceName: Texas Almanac - Coal Mining Locations / Texas Coal Mining Operations
properties.notes: Approximate complex marker near Carlos/Gibbons Creek area.

properties.name: Marshall/Sabine Coal Support Facilities Area
properties.operator: Sabine Mining Company / North American Coal
properties.description: Support and logistics area for Northeast Texas lignite mining around Hallsville/Marshall.
properties.sourceName: Global Energy Monitor - Sabine Mine
properties.notes: Representative support-facility marker near public mine address/area, not a specific building footprint.

properties.name: Martin Lake Coal Rail / Handling Corridor
properties.description: Coal rail and handling infrastructure serving Martin Lake Steam Electric Station and connecting coal supply to the plant.
properties.sourceName: GridInfo - Martin Lake coal plant
properties.notes: Representative marker adjacent to plant; included to show coal logistics, not a separate mine.

properties.name: Robertson-Limestone Permitted Lignite Area
properties.description: Representative marker for the active/permitted lignite mining district around Kosse, Oak Grove, and Robertson-Limestone County operations.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Lignite Surface Mine Permit Locations, February 2023
properties.notes: Representative permit-district marker, not a mine entrance.

properties.name: Leon-Freestone Jewett Lignite Appraisal Area
properties.description: Representative marker for Jewett/Limestone-area lignite appraisals, mining, and reclaimed mine lands.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Lignite Surface Mine Permit Locations, February 2023
properties.notes: Representative point based on known mine district; not a specific permit boundary.

properties.name: South Texas Olmos/San Pedro Coal Appraisal Area
properties.description: Representative marker for South Texas San Pedro/Santo Tomas/Olmos coal beds and historic/permit-area coal appraisal context.
properties.sourceName: USGS - The San Pedro and Santo Tomas Coal Beds
properties.notes: Regional point; use for geologic/appraisal context only.

properties.name: Northeast Texas Lignite Permit Belt
properties.description: Representative marker for Northeast Texas lignite permits, mine support, and resource appraisal around Sabine, Oak Hill, and Martin Lake areas.
properties.sourceName: Railroad Commission of Texas - Lignite Surface Mine Permit Locations, February 2023
properties.notes: Representative district point, not a specific facility.

properties.description: One of Texas’s best-known historic bituminous coal mining districts and company towns.
